title: Lucky Star Currency, FSL - REKT
relevance_summary: Deployer withdrawing large amounts of tokens using privileged functions and immediately dumping them for BNB

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls withdrawToken() and immediately transfers tokens to an external address

red_flags: Large token withdrawal followed by immediate transfer
Deployer minting and transferring large amounts of tokens
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls withdrawToken() and immediately transfers tokens to an external address
summary: The Lucky Star Currency project deployed contracts with a privileged function that allowed the deployer to withdraw large amounts of tokens and immediately transfer them, leading to a rug pull. A guard could have detected and blocked this by monitoring for calls to withdrawToken() followed by a transfer to an external address.
